name: Great Chili Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 large Whole chicken breasts, boned, skinless, and diced
2 Apples, cored and sliced but not peeled
3 can Kidney beans (14 oz each, undrained)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, heat the oil and brown the chicken slightly.
2. Add all of the remaining ingredients except the kidney beans and simmer for 1 hour.
3. Add the kidney beans and simmer for an additional hour, or until the chili reaches the desired thickness.
Each serving provides: 288 calories, 27 g protein, 6 g fat, 33 g carbohydrate, 857 mg sodium, 49 mg cholesterol. Source: Low-Fat Gourmet Chicken Cookbook. Shared and MM by Judi M. Phelps - The San Jose Kid.
